name: maxtac-apple-systems
description: Apple systems surface triage, IPSW CVE-history loops, and Apple Security Bounty program workflows for MaxTAC research.

interface.shortDescription: Apple surface triage, ASB proof, IPSW CVE history, and mitigation-bypass workflows.
interface.longDescription: MaxTAC for Apple Systems adds Apple platform surface triage, Apple Security Bounty Commpage/TCC proof packets, advanced IPSW provenance and patch-diff research, IPSW CVE-history loops across Apple advisories and firmware artifacts, Apple mitigation-bypass workflows, and Apple-specific auditor routing.
defaultPrompt: Use MaxTAC for Apple Systems to prepare this ASB proof packet.
Use MaxTAC for Apple Systems to triage this Apple target surface.
Use MaxTAC for Apple Systems to run an IPSW CVE-history loop for this Apple resource.
Use MaxTAC for Apple Systems to research this Apple mitigation bypass.
